tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: The Northern Lights, 1.1. _________ scientists call the aurora borealis, are one of the most beautiful sights in the night sky. They appear as curtains of green, pink and purple light 1.2. _________ seem to dance high above the ground. The lights are caused 1.3. _________ tiny particles that the Sun sends out into space. When these particles reach the Earth, they are pulled 1.4. _________ the North and South Poles by our planet's magnetic field. There they crash into the gases in the air, 1.5. _________ then glow with colour. The aurora is usually much 1.6. _________ common near the poles than in warmer countries. People travel to places 1.7. _________ as Norway, Iceland and northern Canada to watch the display. You 1.8. _________ to be patient, because the lights do not appear every night. The best time to see 1.9. _________ is during the long, dark winter, when the sky stays clear for hours. For centuries, people who did not understand the science 1.10. _________ the aurora invented many wonderful legends to explain it.
